MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Emilie E. De la Motte, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Rotech Healthcare, Inc. and Centennial Medical Equipment, Inc.
Harry E. Rice, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Rebecca Enrile

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Rotech Healthcare Inc.'s motion to compel further responses to requests for admissions, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $790 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
